title: crotalaria rufipila
intro: Crotalaria rufipila, also known as the hairy stickseed, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which have been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. Crotalaria rufipila is known for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which contribute to its health benefits, such as reducing pain and swelling, and preventing infections. The plant's leaves and stems are used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
